recipes.narrativeJob: Make the portable protocol boundary and backend-specific responsibilities immediately inspectable.
Let a reviewer trace one headline claim through source, extraction, validation, and slide usage.
Pair a small API contract with measured runtime behavior so code and evidence reinforce each other.
Establish one memorable, evidence-bounded thesis before the detailed argument begins.
Explain the cost-adjusted quality measure and connect every symbol to the supplied experiment table.
Make the operating verdict scannable while preserving comparison context for every metric.
Reveal divergence between related series without inventing a cause for the observed pattern.
Prioritize operating risks by likelihood and impact instead of presenting an unlabeled list.
Connect visible product controls to the claimed reviewable-generation workflow without fabricating UI evidence.
Expose ordering, review custody, and failure boundaries across one request lifecycle.
Show the progression from research question to evidence-backed decision with honest stage timing.
Show a forecast and its uncertainty honestly instead of presenting one modeled value as certain.
